# Finding #1 — BAL momentum inverts in EX-BULL (state5==5) → suppress = validated win
**[REDACTED]12. Session: BAL/LAG selection deep-dive (kickoff angle #1 = per-term IC attribution).**

## The diagnosis (per-term IC attribution on `ta`, by DT5G state)
Panel = `ticker_prune`, liq≥1e9, 2014→2026, clean LEAD fwd20/fwd40 (NOT profit_*). Spearman IC.
Scripts: `workspace/bal_ic_attr.sql`, `workspace/bal_ta_panel.sql` → `workspace/bal_ta_panel.csv`.

**Composite `ta` IC by state (fwd20):**
| state | n | IC_ta | IC_mom | IC_val |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| CRISIS(1) | 121k | −0.046 | −0.064 | +0.049 |
| BEAR(2) | 53k | +0.029 | +0.032 | −0.008 |
| NEUTRAL(3) | 348k | +0.062 | +0.059 | +0.017 |
| BULL(4) | 111k | +0.044 | +0.030 | +0.043 |
| **EX-BULL(5)** | 17k | **−0.267** | **−0.307** | **+0.076** |

**EX-BULL momentum inversion is STRUCTURAL — 3/3 episodes** (the only state-5 windows in DT5G history):
2020 IC_mom −0.11 · 2021 −0.48 · 2025 −0.14. Value block stays POSITIVE (+0.076) in EX-BULL.

**Tier-bucket forward returns confirm monotone inversion in EX-BULL** (book buys the wrong end):
- ta 140–155 → fwd20 −6.0% / win 24% (worst)
- ta<70 (low momentum) → fwd20 +5.1% / win 54% (best)
vs BULL where it's correctly monotone (ta≥155 → +9.3%/66%).

## Why this caused the 2025-08 grind
- The grind started **2025-08**. Aug-Sep 2025 = **27 days in EX-BULL (state 5)**.
- Book's momentum tiers (MEGA/MOMENTUM/MOMENTUM_S/S_PRO) fire in `state5 IN (4,5)` — i.e. they buy peak momentum in EX-BULL too.
- The existing `overheat` guard requires VNINDEX > **1.30×MA200** AND (state5==5 OR RSI>0.75). In Aug-Sep 2025 the index was only **1.15–1.28×MA200 → guard NEVER fired**. The book bought momentum freely into the euphoria top, then it reversed → start of the −11.8%/294d grind.
- (NOTE: a *second, separate* problem remains — the 2025-26 NEUTRAL momentum flip: IC_mom 2025 +0.00 / 2026 −0.09 while IC_val +0.05/+0.03. EX-BULL fix only addresses the START of the grind. NEUTRAL style-rotation detector = open angle #2.)

## The fix (validated on faithful 2-ledger engine, real TC, 50B)
In `state5==5`, suppress momentum BUY tiers {MEGA, MOMENTUM, MOMENTUM_S, MOMENTUM_QUALITY, MOMENTUM_A, S_PRO} → `AVOID_exbull`. Keep value tiers (DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY, COMPOUNDER_BUY, RE_BACKLOG_BUY) which have +IC in EX-BULL. Only REMOVES trades → capacity-safe, causal (live DT5G state). Test: `workspace/pt_v22_exbull_test.py`.

**Combined V2.2 + CAPIT v2.1 (50B):**
| window | baseline | EXBULL fix | Δ |
|---|---|---|---|
| FULL 2014-now | 25.77% / −20.1 / Sh1.65 / Cal1.28 | **26.09% / −20.3 / Sh1.68 / Cal1.29** | +0.32pp |
| 2022+ | 16.44% / −18.7 / 1.06 / 0.88 | 16.78% / −17.4 / 1.08 / 0.97 | +0.34pp, DD better |
| **2025+** | 18.30% / −18.7 / 1.04 / 0.98 | **19.85% / −17.4 / 1.13 / 1.14** | **+1.55pp, DD −1.3pp, Sh+0.09, Cal+0.16** |

**BAL leg only (where the fix bites; LAG unaffected), V2.2+capit:**
- FULL: 19.01% / −25.4 / 1.20 → **20.16% / −20.6 / 1.28** (+1.15pp CAGR, **MaxDD −4.8pp**)
- 2025+: 2.59% / −25.4 / 0.23 → **8.36% / −19.9 / 0.48** (+5.8pp CAGR, MaxDD −5.5pp)

Headline = the BAL book's worst-ever drawdown (the 2025 grind, −25.4%) is cut ~5pp because the grind began with EX-BULL top-buying.

## Caveat / robustness
- No-capit base FULL dips slightly (17.70→16.50 BAL-leg) because suppressing 2021 EX-BULL momentum forgoes some price gains (2021 names rose despite −IC; high-mom rose *less*). But **production = V2.2+capit**, where it's net +1.15pp FULL on the BAL leg *and* a large MaxDD cut — the freed cash is redeployed by capit into the following correction.
- Signal is structural (3/3 episodes), causal, removes-only → low overfit risk.

## Deploy recommendation (NOT yet wired to live)
Mirror the overheat guard in `pt_v22_dt5g.py` (after line ~220):
```python
EXB_MOM={"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY","MOMENTUM_A","S_PRO"}
sig_f.loc[(sig_f["state"]==5)&sig_f["play_type"].isin(EXB_MOM),"play_type"]="AVOID_exbull"
```
(and optionally tighten the `overheat` def, but the standalone state5==5 guard is the clean version). Currently DT5G live = NEUTRAL(3), so this would be DORMANT today — safe to deploy, fires only at the next euphoria top.

# Kickoff — BAL & LAG Stock-Selection Deep-Dive
**Created [REDACTED]12 for a fresh session. Goal: improve the SELECTION criteria of V2.3's two books (BAL momentum, LAG PEAD) to reduce style-drag — work inside the SIGNAL, not via defensive overlays.**

## Why this session exists
V2.3 = V2.2 (BAL|LAG static + ETF parking) + capit sleeve = production champion (26.2%/Sh1.66/DD−20.1/Cal1.31, 2014→2026-05). Its only real weakness is the **2025-08→ style-divergence grind** (−11.8% / 294d underwater while VNINDEX +8.4%; breadth was 0.55 = NOT narrow — so the lag is from STOCK SELECTION / style rotation, not megacap-avoidance).

**Already ruled OUT this session (do NOT re-try):**
- Book C (value 3rd book) — dropped; value+momentum co-fell in 2025-26, only a Sharpe (not grind/tail) gain.
- Narrow-bull index participation overlay — no-op + premise wrong (breadth wasn't narrow).
- Book-level grind stops (DD-stop / NAV<MA / mom<0) — with real TC all cost 4-7pp CAGR, whipsaw, cut at bottoms.
- Conclusion that pointed here: the only lever left is **the selection logic itself**.

## CURRENT SELECTION — BAL (Book A), file `signal_v11_sql.py` (SIGNAL_V11)
A 100-pt composite TA score `ta` (~22 weighted CASE WHEN terms), then `play_type` by `ta` threshold × DT5G state × `fa_tier`.
- **`ta` components** (momentum-heavy): RSI level (>0.50 +25, >0.75 +5, <0.30 −10) · MA-stack (Close>MA50>MA200 +25, Close>MA20 +15) · volume surge (Vol≥1.3×Vol_3M_P50 & up +20) · MACDdiff>0 +15 · PE-vs-5Y (cheap +15 / rich −15) · VNINDEX rsi_max3m>0.65 +10 · near-3Y-high ID_HI_3Y≤5 +8 · D_RSI_Max1W>0.65 +5 · FSCORE≥8 +10 · NP YoY (+8/−8) · NP QoQ +8 · sector (banks/8,9 +5; 4,7 −5) · MA50 slope (+5/+5/−5) · drawdown-from-3M-high (Close/HI_3M<0.85 −10) · bank fa_tier (D +10 / A −10).
- **play_type tiers** (buys ONLY in state 3/4/5 — never CRISIS/BEAR): MEGA (ta≥170 bull C/D) · S_PRO (ta≥170) · MOMENTUM (ta≥155 bull C/D) · MOMENTUM_QUALITY (ta≥155 A/B) · MOMENTUM_N (ta≥155 NEUTRAL C/D, fresh-Q≤60d) · COMPOUNDER_BUY (A/B, pe_z<−0.5, ta≥95) · DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY (C, ta≥100, bull, NP|Rev YoY>20%) · MOMENTUM_S (ta≥140) · MOMENTUM_A (ta≥125) · MOMENTUM_S_N (NEUTRAL ta≥140) · COMPOUNDER_HOLD/WAIT/PASS.
- **Book trades tiers (TIER_BAL)**: MEGA, MOMENTUM, MOMENTUM_N, MOMENTUM_S, DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY, RE_BACKLOG_BUY. tier 10%/name, max 12, hold 45d, stop −20%, regime_size overlay, overheat-AVOID, +D1 RE_BACKLOG_BUY (bank ICB 8633).
- **Structural reason it lags grinds**: it chases strength (RSI/MA-stack/near-highs/volume) → when leadership rotates, it holds the prior winners and buys into fading momentum. fa_tier used INVERTED (C/D get the strong-momentum tiers; A/B get quality/compounder) — momentum book likes lower-quality names.

## CURRENT SELECTION — LAG (Book B), PEAD schedule (logic in `pt_v22_dt5g.py` §4, panels from earnings pkls)
- Event filter: **NP_R ≥ 15** (earnings YoY surprise ratio) AND **prior_n_good ≥ 4** (≥4 prior good-surprise quarters = track record) AND **pa_HL3 ≥ 5** (3yr-half-life-weighted prior post-earnings drift ≥ 5%).
- Entry T+5 after Release_Date, hold 25 trading days, sizing 10% (LAG_HI if surprise>0.5) / 8% (LAG_LO), **NO stop**, ETF-park {3:0.7} idle cash.
- Pure post-earnings-announcement-drift (PEAD). ⚠️ **LAG edge at 3rd percentile** (latest-12M +0.26%/42% win vs 2024 peak +9.8%/80%) — see [[edge-health-monitor-amh1-2026]]; cyclical but must watch.

## Research angles for the new session (pick/sequence as you see fit)
1. **Component IC attribution on BAL's `ta`**: which of the ~22 terms actually predict fwd return, in which DT5G state? Decompose `ta` → per-term IC (clean LEAD fwd-ret, NOT profit_*). Likely finding hypothesis: momentum terms strong in trend, destructive in rotation; value/quality terms weak in bull. Re-weight or regime-condition the score.
2. **Style-rotation detector for BAL**: is there a causal signal (leadership breadth, momentum-of-momentum decay, sector dispersion) that flags when to DOWN-weight the momentum tiers vs lean COMPOUNDER/value tiers — WITHOUT a defensive stop (those failed)?
3. **LAG threshold re-fit + decay**: re-examine NP_R≥15 / prior_n_good≥4 / pa_HL3≥5 against latest data; has PEAD drift compressed (hold 25d still optimal)? Is the edge regime-conditional?
4. **fa_tier role revisit**: BAL inverts FA (C/D momentum). Memory says momentum book RESISTS FA overlays ([[fa-layer-ic-audit-2026]], [[fa-rating-8l-pergroup-2026]]) — re-confirm whether any quality gate helps SELECTION (vs sizing).
5. **Capacity-aware**: any selection change must hold at 50B+ NAV (capit capacity trap lesson). Validate on the faithful 2-ledger engine, not reduced harness.

## Data / entry points
- BAL signal: `signal_v11_sql.py` (SIGNAL_V11). LAG: `pt_v22_dt5g.py` §4 + earnings pkls (earnings_px / lagged_pos_ov / earnings_surprise_data / earnings_events_classified).
- Faithful engine: `simulate_holistic_nav.py` (`simulate()`); live track `pt_v22_dt5g.py`; leg NAVs `data/pt_v22_bal_v21_cap.csv` / `pt_v22_lag_v21_cap.csv`.
- BQ: `tav2_bq.ticker` (full feature history + MA/RSI/MACD/PE/FSCORE/NP), `ticker_prune` (quality universe + profit_* targets — training only), `vnindex_5state_dt5g_live` (regime). Column dict: `bigquery_dictionary.json`.
- ⚠️ Table/column name collision: [REDACTED] alias tables, qualify columns (e.g. `tk.ticker='VNINDEX'`). Forward cols (profit_*) NEVER as live filters; use clean LEAD fwd-ret for IC.

## Method discipline (from this workspace's track record)
- Signal-level edge ≠ integrated edge: validate every change on the FAITHFUL full-NAV book, not a reduced harness (many signal-level wins die at integration).
- Charge real TC; adversarially check; report rejections honestly. Momentum book has repeatedly RESISTED overlays — expect to reject more than you adopt.

content.text:
Angle #1 of the deep-dive is complete with a validated, deployable win. Summary:

## Finding #1 — BAL momentum **đảo chiều trong EX-BULL** (state5==5)

**Chẩn đoán (per-term IC attribution trên `ta`, theo DT5G state, clean LEAD fwd-ret):**
- Khối momentum của `ta` chạy tốt ở BULL/NEUTRAL nhưng **ĐẢO NGƯỢC mạnh ở EX-BULL: IC_mom = −0.31**, trong khi khối value vẫn dương (+0.076).
- Cấu trúc, không phải fluke: **3/3 đợt EX-BULL trong lịch sử DT5G** đều âm (2020 −0.11 / 2021 −0.48 / 2025 −0.14).
- Bucket-level đảo đơn điệu: ở EX-BULL, ta 140-155 → fwd20 **−6%/win24%**; ta<70 → **+5.1%/54%** (sách mua đúng đầu sai).

**Đây chính là điểm KHỞI ĐẦU của grind 2025-08:** Aug-Sep 2025 = 27 ngày EX-BULL. Các tier momentum (MEGA/MOMENTUM/MOMENTUM_S/S_PRO) bắn ở `state5 IN (4,5)` → sách mua đỉnh euphoria rồi đảo. Cổng `overheat` cũ cần VNINDEX>1.30×MA200 **chưa từng bắn** (lúc đó chỉ 1.15–1.28×MA200).

**Fix đã validate trên faithful engine (real TC, 50B, chỉ XÓA lệnh → capacity-safe, causal):** ở state5==5, route momentum tiers → AVOID_exbull, giữ value tiers.

| | baseline | +EXBULL fix |
|---|---|---|
| FULL 2014-now | 25.77% / −20.1 / Sh1.65 | **26.09% / −20.3 / Sh1.68** |
| **2025+ (grind)** | 18.30% / −18.7 / 1.04 | **19.85% / −17.4 / 1.13 / Cal1.14** |
| **BAL-leg MaxDD** | −25.4% | **−20.6%** (−4.8pp) |

→ MaxDD tệ nhất của sổ BAL (chính là cái grind 2025) bị cắt ~5pp vì grind bắt đầu từ việc mua đỉnh EX-BULL.

Đã ghi: `workspace/bal_lag_finding1_exbull.md`, memory, cập nhật kickoff. **Chưa deploy live** (cần bạn đồng ý — DT5G hôm nay = NEUTRAL nên fix sẽ ngủ đông, an toàn).

**Residual quan trọng:** fix này chỉ chữa *khởi đầu* grind. Phần *kéo dài* (Oct 2025→2026 ở NEUTRAL) là do momentum-flip theo thời gian (IC_mom 2025 +0.00/2026 −0.09 vs value dương) — cần detector style-rotation riêng (angle #2), chưa làm.

content.text: Angle #2: build a **causal momentum-regime detector** for the NEUTRAL grind. The classic leak-free predictor is the momentum factor's own trailing return (momentum-of-momentum). Let me build the daily momentum-factor return series, then test whether its trailing value predicts when the book's momentum picks fail in NEUTRAL.

input.content:
-- Daily cross-sectional momentum-factor return (causal): rank by ta_mom at t, realize t->t+1 return.
WITH base AS (
  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close,
    t.D_RSI, t.D_MACDdiff, t.MA20, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.MA50_T1, t.Close_T1,
    t.HI_3M_T1, t.ID_HI_3Y, t.D_RSI_Max1W, t.Volume_3M_P50, t.Volume, t.Price,
    LEAD(t.Close,1) OVER (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time) AS c_next
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t
  WHERE t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
),
scored AS (
  SELECT ticker, time,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(c_next, Close)-1 AS ret_fwd1,
    ( IF(D_RSI>0.50,25,0)+IF(Close>MA50 AND MA50>MA200,25,0)
    + IF(Volume>=Volume_3M_P50*1.3 AND Close>Close_T1,20,0)+IF(D_MACDdiff>0,15,0)
    + IF(Close>MA20,15,0)+IF(D_RSI>0.75,5,0)+IF(D_RSI<0.30,-10,0)
    + IF(ID_HI_3Y<=5,8,0)+IF(D_RSI_Max1W>0.65,5,0)
    + IF(MA50_T1>0 AND MA50>MA50_T1,5,0)+IF(MA50_T1>0 AND MA50>MA50_T1*1.005,5,0)
    + IF(MA50_T1>0 AND MA50<MA50_T1,-5,0)+IF(HI_3M_T1>0 AND Close/HI_3M_T1<0.85,-10,0) ) AS ta_mom
  FROM base
  WHERE c_next IS NOT NULL AND Volume_3M_P50*COALESCE(Price,Close)>=1e9
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT time, ret_fwd1, ta_mom,
    NTILE(5) OVER (PARTITION BY time ORDER BY ta_mom) AS q
  FROM scored
)
SELECT time,
  AVG(IF(q=5,ret_fwd1,NULL)) AS top_ret,
  AVG(IF(q=1,ret_fwd1,NULL)) AS bot_ret,
  AVG(IF(q=5,ret_fwd1,NULL)) - AVG(IF(q=1,ret_fwd1,NULL)) AS mom_factor_ret,
  COUNT(*) AS n
FROM ranked
GROUP BY time HAVING n>=20 ORDER BY time

content.text: Now let me build the trailing momentum-regime signal and test whether it predicts when the book's NEUTRAL momentum picks fail.

input.command:
cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && python -c "
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
mf=pd.read_csv('workspace/mom_factor.csv',parse_dates=['time']).sort_values('time')
# causal trailing: cumulative momentum-factor return over past windows, SHIFTED 1 day (use info up to t-1)
mf['mf']=mf['mom_factor_ret']
for w in [60,120,250]:
    mf[f'trail{w}']=mf['mf'].rolling(w).sum().shift(1)
panel=pd.read_csv('workspace/bal_ta_panel.csv',parse_dates=['time'])
panel['ta']=panel.ta_mom+panel.ta_val+panel.ta_sec
df=panel.merge(mf[['time','trail60','trail120','trail250','mf']],on='time',how='left')
def ic(g,col='ta'):
    s=g[[col,'fwd20']].dropna()
    return s[col].rank().corr(s['fwd20'].rank()) if len(s)>30 else np.nan

print('=== NEUTRAL (state3): split by trailing momentum-factor sign ===')
neu=df[df.state5==3].dropna(subset=['trail120'])
for nm,m in [('trail120>0 (mom in favor)',neu.trail120>0),('trail120<0 (mom out of favor)',neu.trail120<=0)]:
    g=neu[m]
    hi=g[g.ta>=140]
    print(f'{nm}: n={len(g):>6} IC_ta={ic(g):+.3f}  | ta>=140: n={len(hi):>5} fwd20={hi.fwd20.mean():+.3f} win={(hi.fwd20>0).mean():.0%}')
print()
print('=== same for trail60 ===')
neu2=df[df.state5==3].dropna(subset=['trail60'])
for nm,m in [('trail60>0',neu2.trail60>0),('trail60<=0',neu2.trail60<=0)]:
    g=neu2[m]; hi=g[g.ta>=140]
    print(f'{nm}: n={len(g):>6} IC_ta={ic(g):+.3f}  | ta>=140: n={len(hi):>5} fwd20={hi.fwd20.mean():+.3f} win={(hi.fwd20>0).mean():.0%}')
print()
print('=== Was trail120 negative during 2025-08+ grind? (NEUTRAL days) ===')
g=neu[neu.time>=\"2025-08-01\"]
print(f'2025-08+ NEUTRAL: mean trail120={g.trail120.mean():+.3f}  pct days trail120<0={ (g.drop_duplicates(\"time\").trail120<=0).mean():.0%}')
print(g.drop_duplicates('time')[['time','trail120','trail60']].set_index('time').resample('ME').mean().tail(12).to_string())
"

content.text:
Important honest result: the momentum-of-momentum gate **works in the pooled sample** (NEUTRAL trail120<0 → IC drops to −0.007, ta≥140 win 58%→49%) — but during the 2025-08+ grind, **trail120 stayed POSITIVE (+0.099, only 6% of days negative)**. The momentum factor did NOT crash. So this gate would NOT have flagged the grind.

That tells me the grind is an *absolute-vs-index* divergence (the book's high-ta names fell while the index rose), not a within-universe momentum-factor crash. Let me confirm the real mechanism: index vs equal-weight book universe.

content.text: Confirmed and the picture is now complete. The momentum gradient is **steep in BULL** (ta≥155 → +9.3%, monotone) but **flat/plateau in NEUTRAL** (ta 125→155 all ≈ +4.3–5.5%). Combined with the megacap evidence, angle #2 resolves to an honest structural conclusion. Let me record it.

input.content:
# Finding #2 — the 2025-26 NEUTRAL grind is NOT fixable by momentum selection (structural style-rotation)
**[REDACTED]12. Kickoff angle #2 = causal style-rotation detector to fix the grind's PERSISTENCE.** Conclusion: the persistence is structural; no momentum-selection lever cures it. Honest reject + redirect.

## What I tested
1. **Momentum-of-momentum gate** (causal): daily cross-sectional momentum-factor return = top-quintile minus bottom-quintile `ta_mom`, realized t→t+1 (`workspace/mom_factor.sql` → `mom_factor.csv`); trailing 60/120/250d, shifted 1d.
   - **Works in pooled sample**: NEUTRAL with trail120<0 → composite IC 0.073→−0.007, ta≥140 win 58%→49%. A real gate for genuine momentum *crashes*.
   - **But FAILS to flag the 2025 grind**: during 2025-08+ NEUTRAL, trail120 stayed **POSITIVE (+0.099, only 6% of days <0)**. The momentum factor never crashed → gate would not have fired. ⇒ the grind is not a within-universe momentum crash.

2. **Universe-vs-index decomposition** (EW liquid-quality universe = the book's pond vs VNINDEX, monthly cum):
   2025-08 EW +4.9 / VNI +12.0 · Nov EW −1.4 / VNI **+3.1** · Dec EW −1.5 / VNI **+5.5** · Apr-26 EW −0.6 / VNI **+10.7**.
   ⇒ The broad quality universe **absolutely declined** 2025-09→2026 while the index rose on **megacaps (VIC-led)**. The book equal-weights the broad pond → it cannot capture a cap-weighted megacap rally.

3. **Did `ta` rank the winners?** (the decisive test)
   - **VIC** (+16.2% fwd20 in the grind): avg `ta`=89, ta≥140 only **1%** of days. **VHM** ta 59, **VRE** ta 72. The book buys momentum at ta≥140 → **never bought the Vingroup rally**.
   - Top-20 universe names by realized fwd20 (2025-08→2026-02) = VVS, VIC, DCL, BSR, GAS, PVD, PLX, OIL… (energy/cyclical + megacap). **0 of 20 had avg ta≥140** — all sat in the low-mid band the book treats as WAIT/PASS.

4. **Momentum gradient by state** (why you can't just lower the threshold):
   - BULL: steep & monotone — ta≥155 +9.3% / ta 70-95 +2.8%. High threshold earns a big premium → keep it.
   - NEUTRAL: **flat plateau** — ta≥155 +4.3% / 140-155 +5.5% / 125-140 +4.7% / 95-125 +3.3% / 70-95 +2.4%. Above ~125 there is ~no premium; below ~95 it dilutes into noise (53% win). The winners (ta 50-130) live in/below the noise band.

## Verdict
The 2025-26 grind = a **style rotation to energy/cyclical + megacap leaders that score LOW-MID `ta`**. This is structural, not a tuning problem:
- Can't gate it (momentum-of-momentum stayed positive).
- Can't lower thresholds (BULL needs the high threshold; NEUTRAL low band is noise).
- Can't reach the winners with a momentum score (VIC/energy don't trigger the RSI/MA-stack/volume/near-high stack).
**Momentum SELECTION criteria cannot fix the grind persistence.** Confirms the workspace prior: "momentum book RESISTS overlays." The only validated lever this session is Finding #1 (EXBULL onset).

## Redirect (for a future session — NOT this one's scope)
Capturing the 2025 leaders needs an **orthogonal sleeve**, not a momentum tweak. Generic VALUE (Book C) was the wrong instrument (co-fell, dropped). But the actual leaders were specifically **energy/cyclical (oil&gas: BSR/GAS/PVD/OIL/PLX) + megacap (VIC)** — see [[cyclical-commodity-framework-2026]], [[oil-gas-chain-8l-2026]], [[biodiversity-test-amh5-2026]] (VALUE_PB = natural diversifier of the momentum book). A targeted cyclical/energy or megacap-participation sleeve is the candidate — distinct from the dropped generic-value Book C. Hold as a hypothesis; do not build without forward validation given edge-cycle timing.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Kickoff — BAL & LAG Stock-Selection Deep-Dive
**Created [REDACTED]12 for a fresh session. Goal: improve the SELECTION criteria of V2.3's two books (BAL momentum, LAG PEAD) to reduce style-drag — work inside the SIGNAL, not via defensive overlays.**

## Why this session exists
V2.3 = V2.2 (BAL|LAG static + ETF parking) + capit sleeve = production champion (26.2%/Sh1.66/DD−20.1/Cal1.31, 2014→2026-05). Its only real weakness is the **2025-08→ style-divergence grind** (−11.8% / 294d underwater while VNINDEX +8.4%; breadth was 0.55 = NOT narrow — so the lag is from STOCK SELECTION / style rotation, not megacap-avoidance).

**Already ruled OUT this session (do NOT re-try):**
- Book C (value 3rd book) — dropped; value+momentum co-fell in 2025-26, only a Sharpe (not grind/tail) gain.
- Narrow-bull index participation overlay — no-op + premise wrong (breadth wasn't narrow).
- Book-level grind stops (DD-stop / NAV<MA / mom<0) — with real TC all cost 4-7pp CAGR, whipsaw, cut at bottoms.
- Conclusion that pointed here: the only lever left is **the selection logic itself**.

## CURRENT SELECTION — BAL (Book A), file `signal_v11_sql.py` (SIGNAL_V11)
A 100-pt composite TA score `ta` (~22 weighted CASE WHEN terms), then `play_type` by `ta` threshold × DT5G state × `fa_tier`.
- **`ta` components** (momentum-heavy): RSI level (>0.50 +25, >0.75 +5, <0.30 −10) · MA-stack (Close>MA50>MA200 +25, Close>MA20 +15) · volume surge (Vol≥1.3×Vol_3M_P50 & up +20) · MACDdiff>0 +15 · PE-vs-5Y (cheap +15 / rich −15) · VNINDEX rsi_max3m>0.65 +10 · near-3Y-high ID_HI_3Y≤5 +8 · D_RSI_Max1W>0.65 +5 · FSCORE≥8 +10 · NP YoY (+8/−8) · NP QoQ +8 · sector (banks/8,9 +5; 4,7 −5) · MA50 slope (+5/+5/−5) · drawdown-from-3M-high (Close/HI_3M<0.85 −10) · bank fa_tier (D +10 / A −10).
- **play_type tiers** (buys ONLY in state 3/4/5 — never CRISIS/BEAR): MEGA (ta≥170 bull C/D) · S_PRO (ta≥170) · MOMENTUM (ta≥155 bull C/D) · MOMENTUM_QUALITY (ta≥155 A/B) · MOMENTUM_N (ta≥155 NEUTRAL C/D, fresh-Q≤60d) · COMPOUNDER_BUY (A/B, pe_z<−0.5, ta≥95) · DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY (C, ta≥100, bull, NP|Rev YoY>20%) · MOMENTUM_S (ta≥140) · MOMENTUM_A (ta≥125) · MOMENTUM_S_N (NEUTRAL ta≥140) · COMPOUNDER_HOLD/WAIT/PASS.
- **Book trades tiers (TIER_BAL)**: MEGA, MOMENTUM, MOMENTUM_N, MOMENTUM_S, DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY, RE_BACKLOG_BUY. tier 10%/name, max 12, hold 45d, stop −20%, regime_size overlay, overheat-AVOID, +D1 RE_BACKLOG_BUY (bank ICB 8633).
- **Structural reason it lags grinds**: it chases strength (RSI/MA-stack/near-highs/volume) → when leadership rotates, it holds the prior winners and buys into fading momentum. fa_tier used INVERTED (C/D get the strong-momentum tiers; A/B get quality/compounder) — momentum book likes lower-quality names.

## CURRENT SELECTION — LAG (Book B), PEAD schedule (logic in `pt_v22_dt5g.py` §4, panels from earnings pkls)
- Event filter: **NP_R ≥ 15** (earnings YoY surprise ratio) AND **prior_n_good ≥ 4** (≥4 prior good-surprise quarters = track record) AND **pa_HL3 ≥ 5** (3yr-half-life-weighted prior post-earnings drift ≥ 5%).
- Entry T+5 after Release_Date, hold 25 trading days, sizing 10% (LAG_HI if surprise>0.5) / 8% (LAG_LO), **NO stop**, ETF-park {3:0.7} idle cash.
- Pure post-earnings-announcement-drift (PEAD). ⚠️ **LAG edge at 3rd percentile** (latest-12M +0.26%/42% win vs 2024 peak +9.8%/80%) — see [[edge-health-monitor-amh1-2026]]; cyclical but must watch.

## PROGRESS
- ✅ **Angle #1 DONE ([REDACTED]12) — see `workspace/bal_lag_finding1_exbull.md`**: per-term IC attribution found BAL momentum block INVERTS in EX-BULL (state5==5, IC_mom −0.31, 3/3 episodes). This caused the START of the 2025-08 grind (Aug-Sep 2025 = 27d EX-BULL, book bought the top; overheat guard never fired). Fix = suppress momentum tiers in state5==5 → validated win on faithful engine (V2.2+capit 2025+ 18.3→19.85%, DD −18.7→−17.4; BAL-leg MaxDD −25.4→−20.6). NOT yet deployed live.
- ⏳ **Residual / angle #2 OPEN**: the 2025-26 NEUTRAL momentum flip (IC_mom 2025 +0.00/2026 −0.09 vs IC_val positive). EX-BULL fix only addresses the grind's onset; the NEUTRAL persistence needs a causal style-rotation detector (momentum-of-momentum / breadth / dispersion).

## Research angles for the new session (pick/sequence as you see fit)
1. **Component IC attribution on BAL's `ta`**: which of the ~22 terms actually predict fwd return, in which DT5G state? Decompose `ta` → per-term IC (clean LEAD fwd-ret, NOT profit_*). Likely finding hypothesis: momentum terms strong in trend, destructive in rotation; value/quality terms weak in bull. Re-weight or regime-condition the score.
2. **Style-rotation detector for BAL**: is there a causal signal (leadership breadth, momentum-of-momentum decay, sector dispersion) that flags when to DOWN-weight the momentum tiers vs lean COMPOUNDER/value tiers — WITHOUT a defensive stop (those failed)?
3. **LAG threshold re-fit + decay**: re-examine NP_R≥15 / prior_n_good≥4 / pa_HL3≥5 against latest data; has PEAD drift compressed (hold 25d still optimal)? Is the edge regime-conditional?
4. **fa_tier role revisit**: BAL inverts FA (C/D momentum). Memory says momentum book RESISTS FA overlays ([[fa-layer-ic-audit-2026]], [[fa-rating-8l-pergroup-2026]]) — re-confirm whether any quality gate helps SELECTION (vs sizing).
5. **Capacity-aware**: any selection change must hold at 50B+ NAV (capit capacity trap lesson). Validate on the faithful 2-ledger engine, not reduced harness.

## Data / entry points
- BAL signal: `signal_v11_sql.py` (SIGNAL_V11). LAG: `pt_v22_dt5g.py` §4 + earnings pkls (earnings_px / lagged_pos_ov / earnings_surprise_data / earnings_events_classified).
- Faithful engine: `simulate_holistic_nav.py` (`simulate()`); live track `pt_v22_dt5g.py`; leg NAVs `data/pt_v22_bal_v21_cap.csv` / `pt_v22_lag_v21_cap.csv`.
- BQ: `tav2_bq.ticker` (full feature history + MA/RSI/MACD/PE/FSCORE/NP), `ticker_prune` (quality universe + profit_* targets — training only), `vnindex_5state_dt5g_live` (regime). Column dict: `bigquery_dictionary.json`.
- ⚠️ Table/column name collision: [REDACTED] alias tables, qualify columns (e.g. `tk.ticker='VNINDEX'`). Forward cols (profit_*) NEVER as live filters; use clean LEAD fwd-ret for IC.

## Method discipline (from this workspace's track record)
- Signal-level edge ≠ integrated edge: validate every change on the FAITHFUL full-NAV book, not a reduced harness (many signal-level wins die at integration).
- Charge real TC; adversarially check; report rejections honestly. Momentum book has repeatedly RESISTED overlays — expect to reject more than you adopt.

**Diagnosis**: composite `ta` IC by DT5G state (clean LEAD fwd20, ticker_prune, liq≥1e9, 2014+): momentum block works in BULL(+0.030)/NEUTRAL(+0.059) but **INVERTS hard in EX-BULL state5==5: IC_mom −0.307**, value block stays +0.076. Structural across **3/3** EX-BULL episodes (2020 −0.11 / 2021 −0.48 / 2025 −0.14 — the only state-5 windows in DT5G history). Tier buckets in EX-BULL are monotone-inverted: ta 140-155 → fwd20 −6%/win24%; ta<70 → +5.1%/54%.

**Root cause of the 2025-08 grind START**: book's MEGA/MOMENTUM/MOMENTUM_S/S_PRO tiers fire in `state5 IN (4,5)`. Existing `overheat` guard needs VNINDEX>1.30×MA200 which NEVER fired then (index only 1.15-1.28×MA200).

content.text:
Deep-dive complete. Both kickoff angles are resolved — one validated win, one honest structural reject with a redirect.

## Tóm tắt phiên (BAL/LAG selection deep-dive)

### ✅ Finding #1 — EX-BULL momentum inversion (deployable win)
Per-term IC attribution cho thấy khối momentum của `ta` **đảo chiều mạnh ở EX-BULL (state5==5): IC_mom −0.31**, cấu trúc qua **3/3 đợt** (2020/2021/2025). Đây chính là **điểm khởi đầu grind 2025-08**: sách mua đỉnh euphoria (cổng overheat cũ cần >1.30×MA200, chưa từng bắn). Fix = suppress momentum tiers ở state5==5 → validate trên faithful engine:
- V2.2+capit FULL **25.77→26.09%**, **2025+ 18.30→19.85% / DD −18.7→−17.4 / Sh 1.04→1.13**
- BAL-leg MaxDD **−25.4→−20.6pp** (cắt ~5pp drawdown tệ nhất)
- Removes-only → capacity-safe, causal. **Chưa wire live** (DT5G hôm nay = NEUTRAL → fix ngủ đông, an toàn deploy).

### ✅ Finding #2 — phần kéo dài của grind KHÔNG sửa được bằng selection (structural)
- Momentum-of-momentum gate chạy đúng pooled nhưng **dương suốt grind** → không flag được.
- Phân rã: rổ EW quality (ao của sách) **sụt tuyệt đối** trong khi index tăng nhờ **megacap (VIC-led)**.
- **Test quyết định:** VIC +16.2% fwd20 nhưng `ta`≈89 (ta≥140 chỉ 1% phiên); **0/20 mã thắng nhất** (VIC + dầu khí BSR/GAS/PVD/OIL + VVS, ta 50-130) đủ điều kiện mua ở ngưỡng ≥140.
- Gradient momentum **phẳng ở NEUTRAL** (không hạ ngưỡng được) nhưng **dốc ở BULL** (không nâng được). → momentum book về cấu trúc không ôm được leaders cyclical/megacap.
- **Redirect:** cần sleeve trực giao CYCLICAL/ENERGY hoặc megacap-participation (KHÁC Book C value chung đã bỏ) — để dành session sau, cần forward-validate.

**Artifacts:** `workspace/bal_lag_finding1_exbull.md`, `bal_lag_finding2_neutral_grind.md`, `pt_v22_exbull_test.py`; memory + kickoff đã cập nhật.

Bạn muốn mình wire Finding #1 vào `pt_v22_dt5g.py` live bây giờ không, hay để vậy? (Hôm nay NEUTRAL nên dù deploy thì fix vẫn chưa kích hoạt.)

Hãy xem leg NAV thực tế.

cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && python -c "
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
def met(s):
    s=s.dropna(); 
    if len(s)<5: return None
    r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100,dd*100,sh,cagr/abs(dd)
bal=pd.read_csv('data/pt_v22_bal_v21_cap.csv',parse_dates=['time']).set_index('time')
lag=pd.read_csv('data/pt_v22_lag_v21_cap.csv',parse_dates=['time']).set_index('time')
print('cols bal:',list(bal.columns)); print('cols lag:',list(lag.columns))
print()
for lbl,st in [('FULL','2014-01-01'),('2020+','2020-01-01'),('2022+','2022-01-01'),('2024+','2024-01-01'),('2025+','2025-01-01')]:
    b=met(bal['nav'][bal.index>=st]); l=met(lag['nav'][lag.index>=st])
    if b and l:
        print(f'{lbl:6} BAL: CAGR {b[0]:5.1f}% DD {b[1]:6.1f} Sh {b[2]:.2f} Cal {b[3]:.2f}  ||  LAG: CAGR {l[0]:5.1f}% DD {l[1]:6.1f} Sh {l[2]:.2f} Cal {l[3]:.2f}')
"

content.text: LAG dominates standalone on every window. But before recommending a tilt I must check **what actually drives LAG's return** — is it PEAD alpha, or is its idle cash ETF-parked (riding the index)? This matters enormously because in 2025 the index = the VIC megacap rally BAL couldn't capture.

content.text: LAG's alpha is **real, not index-beta**: on days it holds PEAD positions it earns +42%/+28% annualized, but on ETF-park-only days it earns ~0 to −6%. So LAG didn't just ride the VIC rally — it's genuine selection. **But** the deployment profile reveals the catch: LAG only deploys **~40%** of its capital (events are scarce); the rest sits idle. That's the capacity question the user's idea hinges on. Let me measure how LAG's return decays as you give it more capital.

cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && head -135 pt_v22_capit_v21.py > workspace/test_lag_capacity.py && cat >> workspace/test_lag_capacity.py <<'EOF'

# ============ CAPACITY TEST: LAG base book at increasing capital ============
def met(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100,dd*100,sh,cagr/abs(dd)

def runl_cap(sig,tw,label,nav_cap):
    lagts={t for t in set(sig["play_type"]) if t.startswith("LAG")}
    bkw=dict(BKW); bkw["init_nav"]=nav_cap
    kw=dict(hold_days=25,stop_loss=-0.99,stop_exempt_tiers=lagts,
        hold_days_by_tier={t:25 for t in lagts},
        tier_position_limit={t:12 for t in lagts},
        cash_etf_states={3:0.7},**EK)
    nav,_=simulate(sig,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=sorted(set(sig["play_type"])),tier_weights=tw,name=label,**bkw,**kw)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav

print("\n"+"="*78)
print("LAG CAPACITY TEST (base, no capit) — return-per-dollar as book scales")
print("="*78)
for cap in [25, 40, 60, 80, 120]:
    nav=runl_cap(sig_lag,LAG_TW,f"LAG_{cap}B",cap*1_000_000_000)
    s=nav.set_index("time")
    dep=s["deployed_pct"].mean(); etf=s["cash_etf_pct"].mean()
    for lbl,st in [("FULL","2014-01-01"),("2025+","2025-01-01")]:
        m=met(s["nav"][s.index>=st])
        print(f"  {cap:>3}B {lbl:6}: CAGR {m[0]:5.1f}%  DD {m[1]:6.1f}  Sh {m[2]:.2f}  | avg_deployed {dep:4.1f}%  avg_ETFpark {etf:4.1f}%")
EOF
echo "written"; wc -l workspace/test_lag_capacity.py

input.command:
cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && python -c "
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
bal=pd.read_csv('data/pt_v22_bal_v21_cap.csv',parse_dates=['time']).set_index('time')
lag=pd.read_csv('data/pt_v22_lag_v21_cap.csv',parse_dates=['time']).set_index('time')
bal['r']=bal['nav'].pct_change(); lag['r']=lag['nav'].pct_change()
sn={1:'CRISIS',2:'BEAR',3:'NEUTRAL',4:'BULL',5:'EXBULL'}
df=pd.DataFrame({'rb':bal['r'],'rl':lag['r'],'st':bal['state']}).dropna()
print('Per-DT5G-state ANNUALIZED return & Sharpe — BAL vs LAG (full history):')
print(f'{\"state\":8} {\"days\":>5} {\"BAL_ann\":>8} {\"BAL_Sh\":>7} {\"LAG_ann\":>8} {\"LAG_Sh\":>7}  winner')
for st in [1,2,3,4,5]:
    g=df[df.st==st]
    if len(g)<10: continue
    ba=(1+g.rb.mean())**252-1; bs=g.rb.mean()/g.rb.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    la=(1+g.rl.mean())**252-1; ls=g.rl.mean()/g.rl.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    w='LAG' if ls>bs else 'BAL'
    print(f'{sn[st]:8} {len(g):>5} {ba*100:>7.1f}% {bs:>7.2f} {la*100:>7.1f}% {ls:>7.2f}  {w}')
print()
print('Correlation of BAL vs LAG daily returns (diversification):', round(df.rb.corr(df.rl),3))
# also 2025+
print()
print('2025+ per-state:')
d2=df[df.index>=\"2025-01-01\"]
for st in [3,4,5]:
    g=d2[d2.st==st]
    if len(g)<5: continue
    ba=(1+g.rb.mean())**252-1; la=(1+g.rl.mean())**252-1
    print(f'  {sn[st]:8} n={len(g):>3} BAL_ann {ba*100:>6.1f}%  LAG_ann {la*100:>6.1f}%')
"

content.text: Now the state-conditional picture is decisive. Let me compute concrete combined-book numbers for several LAG tilts, including a state-conditional one (the key nuance: **LAG loses money in BEAR**).

input.command:
cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && python -c "
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
bal=pd.read_csv('data/pt_v22_bal_v21_cap.csv',parse_dates=['time']).set_index('time')
lag=pd.read_csv('data/pt_v22_lag_v21_cap.csv',parse_dates=['time']).set_index('time')
d=pd.DataFrame({'rb':bal['nav'].pct_change(),'rl':lag['nav'].pct_change(),'st':bal['state']}).dropna()
def met(r):
    nav=(1+r).cumprod(); yrs=(nav.index[-1]-nav.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=nav.iloc[-1]**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(nav/nav.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100,dd*100,sh,cagr/abs(dd)
def show(r,lbl):
    for w,st in [('FULL','2014-01-01'),('2022+','2022-01-01'),('2025+','2025-01-01')]:
        m=met(r[r.index>=st])
        print(f'  {lbl:22} {w:6}: CAGR {m[0]:5.2f}%  DD {m[1]:6.1f}  Sh {m[2]:.2f}  Cal {m[3]:.2f}')
print('NOTE: naive reweight of two 25B legs; capacity test showed LAG@32B only ~1pp below @25B, so LAG-tilt est is ~1pp optimistic.')
print()
# static tilts
for wl in [0.50,0.60,0.65,0.70]:
    show(wl*d.rl+(1-wl)*d.rb, f'static BAL{1-wl:.2f}/LAG{wl:.2f}')
    print()
# state-conditional: LAG-heavy except protect in BEAR(2)/CRISIS(1) -> keep BAL there
wl_map={1:0.50,2:0.20,3:0.70,4:0.70,5:0.70}  # BEAR: minimize LAG (it loses money); else LAG-heavy
wl_series=d.st.map(wl_map).fillna(0.5)
rc=wl_series*d.rl+(1-wl_series)*d.rb
show(rc,'state-cond (BEAR=BAL)')
"

content.text:
Đây là câu trả lời rõ ràng, và trực giác của bạn **đúng — nhưng cần điều kiện theo state**. Bằng chứng:

## 1. LAG thực sự vượt trội & alpha là THẬT (không phải ăn theo index)
Standalone (cùng 25B): FULL BAL 19.0%/Sh1.20 vs **LAG 29.9%/Sh1.57**; 2025+ BAL 2.6% vs **LAG 25.0%**. Và LAG kiếm tiền từ **ngày có vị thế PEAD** (+42%/năm), ngày chỉ ETF-park thì ~0 đến −6% → không phải beta index.

## 2. LAG scale tốt (capacity decay NHẸ — khác hẳn capit)
| Vốn LAG | FULL CAGR | 2025+ | deployed% |
|---|---|---|---|
| 25B | 28.1% | 21.8% | 39.5% |
| 40B | 25.7% | 19.4% | 38.3% |
| 60B | 25.3% | 19.2% | 36.4% |
| 120B | 22.6% | 18.6% | 33.0% |

Tăng vốn 5× chỉ giảm ~5.5pp CAGR (capit thì sụp). LAG **có thể nhận thêm vốn**.

## 3. NHƯNG phải theo STATE — LAG LỖ trong BEAR ⚠️
Annualized return / Sharpe theo DT5G state (full history):
| State | BAL | LAG | |
|---|---|---|---|
| CRISIS | 8.1% / 0.92 | 21.2% / 0.79 | ~hòa |
| **BEAR** | **6.0% / 1.59** | **−14.4% / −0.97** | **BAL — LAG LỖ** |
| NEUTRAL | 22.3% / 1.39 | 31.2% / 1.69 | LAG |
| BULL | 48% / 1.55 | 87% / 4.01 | LAG mạnh |
| EXBULL | −12% / −0.39 | 114% / 3.22 | LAG mạnh |

PEAD thất bại trong gấu (tin lãi tốt vẫn bị bán). BAL là người gác cửa phòng thủ ở BEAR/CRISIS (đã gated). Corr BAL/LAG = 0.48 → vẫn bổ trợ, không thừa.

## 4. Kết quả tilt (combined, ước lượng — naive reweight, ~1pp lạc quan cho LAG)
| Phương án | FULL | DD | Sharpe | 2025+ |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 50/50 (hiện tại) | 24.8% | −20.5 | 1.62 | 13.7% |
| static 35/65 | 26.4% | −22.7 | 1.65 | 17.1% |
| static 30/70 | 26.9% | **−23.9** | 1.65 | 18.3% |
| **state-cond (BEAR→BAL, còn lại LAG 0.70)** | **27.7%** | **−18.8** | **1.80** | **18.3%** |

→ **State-conditional THỐNG TRỊ mọi metric cùng lúc**: return cao nhất, DD tốt nhất (−18.8 vs −20.5), Sharpe 1.80, Calmar 1.47. Vì BEAR chính là lúc drawdown xảy ra — giữ BAL ở đó bảo vệ, còn lại nghiêng LAG để ăn upside.

## Khuyến nghị
**Có — nên tăng tỉ trọng LAG, theo state, KHÔNG tĩnh.** Cụ thể: LAG-nặng trong CRISIS/NEUTRAL/BULL/EXBULL, **BAL-bảo vệ trong BEAR** (đây là điểm mấu chốt; tilt tĩnh sang LAG sẽ làm DD xấu đi vì ăn trọn cú lỗ BEAR của LAG).

**2 cảnh báo trước khi triển khai:**
1. **Edge-cycle**: LAG đang ở percentile-3 (đáy) theo `lag_edge_health.csv` — backtest giả định edge PEAD lịch sử; nếu PEAD còn nén, return forward thấp hơn. → tilt **vừa phải (LAG ~0.60-0.65, không 1.0)**, giữ BAL làm ballast, monitor edge.
2. Số trên là reweight thô (daily-rebal, bỏ qua capacity ~1pp). Cần chạy **faithful combined engine** với phân bổ vốn thật để chốt số chính xác.

Việc này khớp khung **Sleeve Budget Allocator** đã có trong memory (sleeve weights theo state).

Bạn muốn mình (a) chạy faithful combined backtest với allocator state-conditional để ra số chính xác, hay (b) chỉ ghi lại finding và để bạn quyết định tỉ trọng?

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
pt_onewallet_faithful.py — ONE 50B wallet: momentum + LAG + capit + ETF parking.\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Tests the user's architecture question: do we need two separate 25B books, or is
ONE ledger with sleeve weights better? Capital flows naturally: when LAG is idle
(no earnings events ~60% of time) its cash serves momentum/parking/capit, and
vice versa. Sleeve sizing keeps per-position VND comparable to the two-book setup
(mom 5% of 50B NAV ~= 10% of 25B; LAG 5%/4% ~= 10%/8% of 25B).
  Sleeve 1 MOMENTUM: BA-v11 TIER_BAL, w=0.05/name
  Sleeve 2 LAG     : earnings schedule, w=0.05/0.04, 25td, no stop, cap 8+8
  Sleeve 3 CAPIT   : committed playbook sleeve, sized on the wallet's true idle cash
  Sleeve 4 PARKING : idle cash -> E1VFVN30 in NEUTRAL {3:0.7} (same as V4 spec)
Compare vs two-book V2.1+CAPIT (23.86%/Sh1.71/DD-20.8 faithful).
Run: python pt_onewallet_faithful.py
"""
import sys, os, pickle
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import simulate_holistic_nav as shn
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate

W = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
INIT = 50_000_000_000
TIER_BAL = ["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
BUY_TIERS = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
             "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY","COMPOUNDER_BUY","S_PRO"}
EVENTS = [("2014-05-08",1,False),("2015-08-24",3,False),("2016-01-18",3,True),
          ("2018-05-28",1,False),("2020-03-12",2,False),
          ("2022-04-20",1,False),("2022-06-20",2,True),("2022-09-29",2,True),
          ("2023-10-31",1,False),("2024-04-19",4,False),("2025-04-03",4,False),
          ("2026-03-09",3,False)]
def size_of(state, grind):
    return (1.0 if state == 1 else 0.5) * (0.5 if grind else 1.0)

print("[1] Loading...")
panel = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","v4f_panel_2014.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(panel["time"].unique())
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
opens  = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"]))  for tk, g in panel.groupby("ticker")}
liqlk  = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in panel.itertuples()}
dtg = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","daily_comovement_dt5g.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in zip(dtg["time"], dtg["state"])}
last_st=None
for d in vni_dates:
    if d in state_by_date: last_st=state_by_date[d]
    elif last_st is not None: state_by_date[d]=last_st
vnx = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"VNINDEX.csv"), usecols=["time","Close","MA200","D_RSI"], parse_dates=["time"])
vnx = vnx[vnx["time"] >= panel["time"].min()]
etf = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","e1vfvn30_daily.csv"), parse_dates=["time"])
vn30_und = pd.Series(etf["Close"].values, index=etf["time"])

# momentum signal (same construction as all faithful runs)
sig_b = pickle.load(open(os.path.join(W,"ba_v11_unified_12y_sig.pkl"),"rb"))
sig_b["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig_b["time"])
sig_b = sig_b[sig_b["time"] >= panel["time"].min()].copy()
def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s, days = row["state5"], row["days_since_release"]
    if pd.isna(s): return True

content.content:
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None
rows=[]
for _,row in e_hl3.iterrows():
    tk=row["ticker"]; entry=offd(row["Release_Date"],5)
    if entry is None or tk not in prices: continue
    sd=offd(entry,-1)
    if sd is None or sd not in prices[tk]: continue
    rows.append({"time":sd,"ticker":tk,"play_type":"LAG_HI" if row["surprise_B_MA"]>0.5 else "LAG_LO",
                 "ta":400.0,"Close":prices[tk][sd]})
sig_lag=pd.DataFrame(rows)
shn.TIER_PRIORITY.update({"LAG_HI":88,"LAG_LO":82})

# one-wallet sleeve weights: per-position VND comparable to two-book setup
TW = {**{t:0.05 for t in TIER_BAL}, "LAG_HI":0.05, "LAG_LO":0.04}
TIERS = TIER_BAL + ["LAG_HI","LAG_LO"]
sig_all = pd.concat([sig_mom, sig_lag], ignore_index=True)

LIQ = dict(liquidity_volume_pct=0.20, max_fill_days=5, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, exit_slippage_tiered=True)
COMMON = dict(max_positions=24, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=INIT,
              hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20,
              sector_limit_per_sector={8:4}, ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
              sector_cap_exempt_tiers={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"},
              deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_by_date,
              cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, vn30_underlying=vn30_und,
              etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0, etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0, etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015,
              open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True, **LIQ)
LAGX = dict(hold_days_by_tier={"LAG_HI":25,"LAG_LO":25},
            stop_exempt_tiers={"LAG_HI","LAG_LO"},
            tier_position_limit={"LAG_HI":8,"LAG_LO":8})

def run(sig, tiers, label, tw, extra):
    nav,_=simulate(sig,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=tiers,tier_weights=tw,name=label,**COMMON,**extra)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav
def metrics(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100, dd*100, sh, (cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0)

print("[2] ONE-WALLET base (mom + LAG + parking)...")
nav1 = run(sig_all, TIERS, "OW_base", TW, LAGX)
s1=nav1.set_index("time")["nav"]; c1,d1,sh1,cal1=metrics(s1)
print(f"    base: CAGR {c1:.2f}%  MaxDD {d1:.1f}%  Sharpe {sh1:.2f}")

print("[3] + CAPIT (sized on the wallet's true idle cash)...")
elig=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","capit_event_elig_full.csv"),parse_dates=["event"])
basecash=nav1.set_index("time")["cash_pct"]/100.0
rows2,tw2,ct=[],dict(TW),[]
for i,(ds,st,gr) in enumerate(EVENTS):
    d=pd.Timestamp(ds); e=elig[elig["event"]==d].copy()
    e=e[[t in prices and d in prices[t] for t in e["ticker"]]]
    g=e[e["pbz"]<-1]; c=e[e["pbz"]<0]
    pick=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else e)
    pick=pick.nsmallest(15,"pbz") if len(pick)>15 else pick
    names=list(pick["ticker"])
    if len(names)<3: continue
    pos=basecash.index.searchsorted(d); cf=float(basecash.iloc[max(0,pos-2):pos+1].mean())
    wt=size_of(st,gr)*max(cf,0.0)
    if wt<=0.005: continue
    pt=f"CAPIT_E{i}"; shn.TIER_PRIORITY[pt]=95
    tw2[pt]=wt/len(names); ct.append(pt)
    for t in names: rows2.append({"time":d,"ticker":t,"play_type":pt,"ta":500.0,"Close":prices[t][d]})
sig2=pd.concat([sig_all,pd.DataFrame(rows2)],ignore_index=True)
EX2=dict(hold_days_by_tier={**LAGX["hold_days_by_tier"], **{t:60 for t in ct}},
         stop_exempt_tiers=LAGX["stop_exempt_tiers"]|set(ct),
         slot_exempt_tiers=set(ct),
         tier_position_limit={**LAGX["tier_position_limit"], **{t:15 for t in ct}})
nav2 = run(sig2, TIERS+ct, "OW_capit", tw2, EX2)
s2=nav2.set_index("time")["nav"]; c2,d2,sh2,cal2=metrics(s2)

print("\n"+"="*92)

def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s, days = row["state5"], row["days_since_release"]
    if pd.isna(s): return True
    s = int(s)
    if s in (4,5): return True
    if s == 1: return pd.notna(days) and days <= 30
    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days <= 60
    return True

v["st"]=v["st"].ffill()
oh = set(v[(v["Close"]/v["MA200"]>1.30)&((v["st"]==5)|(v["D_RSI"]>0.75))]["time"])
sig_b.loc[sig_b["time"].isin(oh) & sig_b["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS), "play_type"]="AVOID_overheated"
sec_map = sig_b.dropna(subset=["sec"]).drop_duplicates("ticker").set_index("ticker")["sec"].to_dict()
sig_mom = sig_b[["time","ticker","play_type","ta","Close"]].copy()

# LAG schedule
with open(os.path.join(W,"earnings_surprise_data.pkl"),"rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
fin["Release_Date"]=pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"]); FLOOR=1e9
fin["exp_B_MA"]=fin[["NP_P1","NP_P2","NP_P3","NP_P4"]].mean(axis=1)
fin["surprise_B_MA"]=((fin["NP_P0"]-fin["exp_B_MA"])/np.maximum(np.abs(fin["exp_B_MA"]),FLOOR)).clip(-5,5)
ev_class=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"earnings_events_classified.csv"),parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
ev=ev_class.merge(fin[["ticker","quarter","Release_Date","surprise_B_MA"]],on=["ticker","quarter","Release_Date"],how="left")
ev=ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True); ev["surprise_B_MA"]=ev["surprise_B_MA"].fillna(0)
LN2=np.log(2); HL=3.0; ev["prior_n_good"]=0; ev["pa_HL3"]=np.nan
for tk,g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
    hist=[]
    for ri in g.index.tolist():
        row=ev.loc[ri]; cur=row["Release_Date"]; ev.at[ri,"prior_n_good"]=len(hist)
        if hist:
            da=pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in hist]); pa=np.array([p for _,p in hist])
            wts=np.exp(-LN2*((cur-da).days.values/365.25)/HL)
            ev.at[ri,"pa_HL3"]=(pa*wts).sum()/wts.sum() if wts.sum()>0 else np.nan
        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cur,row["post_ret"]))
e_hl3=ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=15)&(ev["prior_n_good"]>=4)&(ev["pa_HL3"]>=5)].copy()
arr=np.array(vni_dates,dtype="datetime64[ns]")
def offd(ref,off):
    pos=np.searchsorted(arr,np.datetime64(ref),side="right")-1; t=pos+off
    return pd.Timestamp(arr[t]) if 0<=t<len(arr) else None

cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && head -106 pt_onewallet_faithful.py > workspace/pt_onewallet_allocator.py && cat >> workspace/pt_onewallet_allocator.py <<'PYEOF'
# ===================== STATE-CONDITIONAL LAG ALLOCATOR =====================
# Finding: LAG > BAL in CRISIS/NEUTRAL/BULL/EXBULL but LAG LOSES in BEAR (-14%/yr).
# Allocator: per-name LAG weight by DT5G state; DROP LAG in BEAR; tilt up in good states.
# Momentum (TIER_BAL) per-name weight kept flat at base (it is the BEAR/crisis ballast).
sig_lag["st_entry"] = sig_lag["time"].map(state_by_date)
sig_lag["st_entry"] = sig_lag["st_entry"].fillna(3).astype(int)

def build(LAG_W_BY_STATE, mom_w=0.05, lag_hi_mult=1.0, exbull_suppress=False, tag=""):
    """Return (sig_all, TW, TIERS, LAGX) for given LAG state-weight map."""
    sl = sig_lag.copy()
    sl = sl[sl["st_entry"].map(lambda s: LAG_W_BY_STATE.get(s, 0.05)) > 0].copy()
    # encode state into play_type so weight can vary by state
    sl["play_type"] = sl.apply(lambda r: f'{r["play_type"]}_s{r["st_entry"]}', axis=1)
    TW = {t: mom_w for t in TIER_BAL}
    TIERS = list(TIER_BAL)
    hdt, sxt, tpl = {}, set(), {}
    for st, w in LAG_W_BY_STATE.items():
        if w <= 0: continue
        for base, mult in [("LAG_HI", lag_hi_mult), ("LAG_LO", 1.0)]:
            pt = f"{base}_s{st}"
            wgt = w if base == "LAG_HI" else max(w - 0.01, 0.02)  # LAG_LO slightly smaller
            TW[pt] = wgt
            TIERS.append(pt); shn.TIER_PRIORITY[pt] = 88 if base == "LAG_HI" else 82
            hdt[pt] = 25; sxt.add(pt); tpl[pt] = 8
    smom = sig_mom.copy()
    if exbull_suppress:
        EXB = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY","MOMENTUM_A","S_PRO"}
        st_of = smom["time"].map(state_by_date)
        smom.loc[(st_of == 5) & smom["play_type"].isin(EXB), "play_type"] = "AVOID_exbull"
    sig_all = pd.concat([smom, sl], ignore_index=True)
    LAGX = dict(hold_days_by_tier=hdt, stop_exempt_tiers=sxt, tier_position_limit=tpl)
    return sig_all, TW, TIERS, LAGX

LIQ = dict(liquidity_volume_pct=0.20, max_fill_days=5, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, exit_slippage_tiered=True)
COMMON = dict(max_positions=24, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=INIT,
              hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20,
              sector_limit_per_sector={8:4}, ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
              sector_cap_exempt_tiers={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"},
              deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_by_date,
              cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, vn30_underlying=vn30_und,
              etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0, etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0, etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015,
              open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True, **LIQ)
def run(sig, tiers, label, tw, extra):
    nav,_=simulate(sig,prices,vni_dates,allowed_tiers=tiers,tier_weights=tw,name=label,**COMMON,**extra)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav
def met(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100, dd*100, sh, (cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0)

EVENTS_CAP = EVENTS  # reuse
def with_capit(sig_all, TW, TIERS, LAGX, label):
    nav1 = run(sig_all, TIERS, label+"_base", TW, LAGX)
    basecash = nav1.set_index("time")["cash_pct"]/100.0
    elig = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","capit_event_elig_full.csv"),parse_dates=["event"])
    rows2, tw2, ct = [], dict(TW), []
    for i,(ds,st,gr) in enumerate(EVENTS_CAP):
        d=pd.Timestamp(ds); e=elig[elig["event"]==d].copy()
        e=e[[t in prices and d in prices[t] for t in e["ticker"]]]
        g=e[e["pbz"]<-1]; c=e[e["pbz"]<0]
        pick=g if len(g)>=3 else (c if len(c)>=3 else e)
        pick=pick.nsmallest(15,"pbz") if len(pick)>15 else pick
        names=list(pick["ticker"])
        if len(names)<3: continue
        pos=basecash.index.searchsorted(d); cf=float(basecash.iloc[max(0,pos-2):pos+1].mean())
        wt=size_of(st,gr)*max(cf,0.0)
        if wt<=0.005: continue
        pt=f"CAPIT_E{i}"; shn.TIER_PRIORITY[pt]=95
        tw2[pt]=wt/len(names); ct.append(pt)
        for t in names: rows2.append({"time":d,"ticker":t,"play_type":pt,"ta":500.0,"Close":prices[t][d]})
    sig2=pd.concat([sig_all,pd.DataFrame(rows2)],ignore_index=True)
    EX2=dict(hold_days_by_tier={**LAGX["hold_days_by_tier"], **{t:60 for t in ct}},
             stop_exempt_tiers=LAGX["stop_exempt_tiers"]|set(ct),
             slot_exempt_tiers=set(ct),
             tier_position_limit={**LAGX["tier_position_limit"], **{t:15 for t in ct}})
    nav2 = run(sig2, TIERS+ct, label+"_capit", tw2, EX2)
    return nav1, nav2

# ---- ARMS ----
ARMS = {
  "A_base_50/50 (flat LAG=.05)":  dict(LAG_W_BY_STATE={1:0.05,2:0.05,3:0.05,4:0.05,5:0.05}, exbull_suppress=False),
  "B_alloc (BEAR=0, good=.08)":   dict(LAG_W_BY_STATE={1:0.06,2:0.00,3:0.08,4:0.08,5:0.08}, exbull_suppress=False),
  "C_alloc + EXBULL-suppress":    dict(LAG_W_BY_STATE={1:0.06,2:0.00,3:0.08,4:0.08,5:0.08}, exbull_suppress=True),
  "D_alloc aggressive (good=.10)":dict(LAG_W_BY_STATE={1:0.06,2:0.00,3:0.10,4:0.10,5:0.10}, exbull_suppress=True),
}
print("\n"+"="*100)
print("STATE-CONDITIONAL LAG ALLOCATOR — faithful one-wallet 50B (mom+LAG+capit+park)")
print("="*100)
print(f"{'arm':<32}{'window':>8}{'CAGR':>9}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}")
results={}
for name,cfg in ARMS.items():
    sig_all,TW,TIERS,LAGX = build(**cfg)
    nb,nc = with_capit(sig_all,TW,TIERS,LAGX,name[:6])
    s=nc.set_index("time")["nav"]; results[name]=s
    for wlbl,wst in [("FULL","2014-01-01"),("2022+","2022-01-01"),("2025+","2025-01-01")]:
        m=met(s[s.index>=wst])
        print(f"{name:<32}{wlbl:>8}{m[0]:>8.2f}%{m[1]:>8.1f}%{m[2]:>8.2f}{m[3]:>8.2f}")
    dep=nb.set_index("time")["deployed_pct"].mean()
    print(f"{'':<32}{'(deployed avg '+format(dep,'.0f')+'%)':>41}")
for name,s in results.items():
    s.to_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","alloc_"+name[:6].replace('/','_').replace(' ','')+".csv"))
PYEOF
echo "written"; wc -l workspace/pt_onewallet_allocator.py

content.text:
This is the decision-ready answer. **Arm F (gentle tilt) dominates on every metric and window:**

| Arm (all + capit, faithful 50B one-wallet) | FULL CAGR | FULL DD | FULL Sh | 2025+ CAGR | 2025+ DD | 2025+ Sh |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| A — base (flat LAG .05) | 21.85% | −24.1 | 1.29 | 13.67% | −24.1 | 0.76 |
| B — aggressive (good=.08, BEAR=0) | 22.27% | **−26.6** | 1.27 | 19.40% | −21.1 | 0.99 |
| E — NEUTRAL-only tilt | 22.29% | −26.5 | 1.29 | 19.23% | −21.1 | 0.99 |
| **F — gentle (good=.065, BEAR=0)** | **22.94%** | **−23.5** | **1.35** | **19.65%** | **−20.7** | **0.99** |

## Câu trả lời chính xác (faithful engine)

**CÓ — nên tăng tỉ trọng LAG theo state, NHƯNG nhẹ tay, và BẮT BUỘC bỏ LAG trong BEAR.** Phương án F (LAG per-name 0.05→**0.065** ở CRISIS/NEUTRAL/BULL/EXBULL, **=0 trong BEAR**) cải thiện **mọi chỉ số, mọi cửa sổ cùng lúc**:
- FULL: 21.85→**22.94%** (+1.1pp), DD −24.1→**−23.5 (tốt hơn)**, Sharpe 1.29→**1.35**
- 2025+ (grind): 13.67→**19.65%** (**+6pp!**), DD −24.1→−20.7, Sharpe 0.76→0.99

## Phát hiện then chốt từ faithful (khác với ước lượng thô trước đó)
1. **Bỏ LAG trong BEAR là đòn bẩy lớn nhất** — LAG lỗ −14%/năm ở BEAR; cắt nó đi vừa tăng return vừa giảm DD.
2. **Tilt MẠNH (0.08-0.10) phản tác dụng**: Arm B/D đẩy MaxDD full-period xấu đi (−24.1→−26.6→−29.5) vì **khuếch đại cú sập nhanh COVID-2020** (DD 2020 −12.6→−20.0) — LAG không có stop, vị thế lớn cưỡi crash xuống. Base có DD tệ nhất ở **chính grind 2025**; tilt mạnh chỉ đổi rủi-ro-grind lấy rủi-ro-crash.
3. **Nhẹ tay (0.065) ăn gần trọn phần lợi 2025 mà KHÔNG khuếch đại crash** → nằm dưới ngưỡng gây hại. Đây là "sweet spot".
4. Targeting riêng NEUTRAL (E) không hơn — **độ lớn** quan trọng hơn chọn state.

## Cảnh báo
- **Edge-cycle**: LAG ở percentile-3 (đáy). Backtest giả định edge PEAD lịch sử → forward có thể thấp hơn. Chính vì vậy **nhẹ tay (0.065) là lựa chọn thận trọng đúng** — giữ momentum làm ballast, monitor `lag_edge_health.csv`.
- Đây là spec **one-wallet** (base 21.85% < two-book champion 25.77%); con số tuyệt đối là của one-wallet, **delta** (+1.1pp full / +6pp 2025 / DD tốt hơn) mới là tín hiệu chuyển giao. Trong production two-book = nâng vốn cấp cho sổ LAG ~+30% ở good-states, =0 trong BEAR.

Trực giác của bạn đúng một nửa: **bỏ LAG-trong-bear + up-tilt vừa phải** là thắng lớn; nhưng "tăng mạnh" thì backfire ở crash. Để mình ghi lại finding + cập nhật memory chứ?

Đúng — để mình ghi finding vào memory, **nhưng phải làm rõ một hiểu lầm về con số 65/35** trước, rồi chạy thẳng phiên bản **two-book** với chính sách phân bổ vốn theo state mà bạn mô tả, để ra số production.

Lưu ý quan trọng: F (per-name 0.065 vs 0.05) là **cỡ lệnh mỗi mã**, KHÔNG phải tỉ trọng vốn 65/35 giữa 2 sổ. Bạn đang đề xuất một scheme rõ ràng hơn ở **cấp vốn sổ** (NEUTRAL: LAG 65% / Mom 35%, chỉnh theo state, BEAR bỏ LAG) — cái đó test trực tiếp được. Let me run it.

input.command:
cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && python -c "
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
bal=pd.read_csv('data/pt_v22_bal_v21_cap.csv',parse_dates=['time']).set_index('time')
lag=pd.read_csv('data/pt_v22_lag_v21_cap.csv',parse_dates=['time']).set_index('time')
d=pd.DataFrame({'rb':bal['nav'].pct_change(),'rl':lag['nav'].pct_change(),'st':bal['state']}).dropna()
d['st']=d['st'].astype(int)
TC=0.001  # rebalance friction on turnover at state change
def run_alloc(wmap,lag_cap_haircut=0.0):
    # wmap: state-> w_lag ; rebalance at state transition; capacity haircut on LAG daily ret
    nav=1.0; w_lag=wmap.get(int(d['st'].iloc[0]),0.5); prev_st=int(d['st'].iloc[0])
    out=[]
    rl_adj=d['rl']*(1-lag_cap_haircut)
    for t,row in d.iterrows():
        st=int(row['st'])
        if st!=prev_st:
            new_w=wmap.get(st,0.5)
            nav*= (1 - TC*abs(new_w-w_lag))   # rebalance cost
            w_lag=new_w; prev_st=st
        r= w_lag*rl_adj.loc[t] + (1-w_lag)*row['rb']
        nav*=(1+r); out.append((t,nav))
    s=pd.Series(dict(out)); return s
def met(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100,dd*100,sh,cagr/abs(dd)
# schemes (w_lag by state 1..5)
schemes={
 'base 50/50':            {1:.5,2:.5,3:.5,4:.5,5:.5},
 'USER NEU65 others50 B0':{1:.5,2:.0,3:.65,4:.5,5:.5},
 'LAG65 all-good BEAR0':  {1:.5,2:.0,3:.65,4:.65,5:.65},
 'moderate NEU60 B0':     {1:.5,2:.0,3:.60,4:.55,5:.55},
 'gentle NEU58 B0':       {1:.5,2:.0,3:.58,4:.55,5:.55},
}
# capacity: heavy-LAG schemes need ~32B LAG -> ~1pp/yr haircut. Apply to schemes with w_lag>=.6 anywhere.
print(f'{\"scheme\":<26}{\"window\":>7}{\"CAGR\":>8}{\"MaxDD\":>8}{\"Shrp\":>6}{\"Calmar\":>7}   (LAG cap-haircut)')
for nm,wm in schemes.items():
    hair=0.06 if max(wm.values())>=0.6 else 0.0   # ~6% daily-ret haircut ~ approximates 25->32B decay
    for wl,st in [('FULL','2014-01-01'),('2022+','2022-01-01'),('2025+','2025-01-01')]:
        s=run_alloc(wm,hair); m=met(s[s.index>=st])
        print(f'{nm:<26}{wl:>7}{m[0]:>7.2f}%{m[1]:>7.1f}%{m[2]:>6.2f}{m[3]:>7.2f}'+ (f'   h={hair}' if wl=='FULL' else ''))
    print()
"

content.text:
Đúng cấu trúc rồi, và mình có số **two-book production** (đã trừ hao capacity ~6% cho các nhánh LAG nặng). Kết quả:

| Scheme (BEAR luôn = LAG 0) | FULL CAGR | FULL DD | FULL Sh | FULL Cal | 2025+ CAGR | 2025+ DD |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| base 50/50 (hiện tại) | 24.81% | −20.5 | 1.62 | 1.21 | 13.68% | −20.5 |
| **Bạn: NEU 65, các state khác 50** | 25.28% | −19.1 | 1.70 | 1.32 | 13.45% | −19.1 |
| **Tốt nhất: LAG 65 ở MỌI good-state** | **26.12%** | **−18.6** | **1.79** | **1.40** | **16.11%** | −18.6 |
| moderate (NEU 60) | 25.39% | −19.2 | 1.73 | 1.32 | 14.17% | −19.2 |

## Trả lời trực tiếp

**Cấu trúc bạn nói ĐÚNG**, với 1 tinh chỉnh quan trọng: đừng chỉ tilt 65/35 ở **NEUTRAL** — áp 65/35 cho **CẢ NEUTRAL + BULL + EXBULL** (LAG thắng đậm BULL/EXBULL). Scheme đề xuất:

| State | LAG | Momentum | Lý do |
|---|---|---|---|
| CRISIS (1) | 50% | 50% | ~hòa; capit sleeve mới là chủ lực ở đây |
| **BEAR (2)** | **0%** | **100%** | LAG lỗ −14%/năm trong gấu → bỏ hẳn |
| NEUTRAL (3) | 65% | 35% | LAG > BAL, đúng vùng grind |
| BULL (4) | 65% | 35% | LAG Sharpe 4.0 vs 1.5 |
| EXBULL (5) | 65% | 35% | LAG +114%/Sh3.2; BAL âm |

**Kết quả cuối với 2 book:** FULL **24.8→26.1%**, MaxDD **−20.5→−18.6**, Sharpe **1.62→1.79**, Calmar **1.21→1.40**; 2025+ (grind) **13.7→16.1%**. → Cải thiện đồng thời return + DD + Sharpe.

⚠️ **Lưu ý chính (edge-cycle):** ở cửa sổ 2022-2024 — đúng giai đoạn LAG yếu — nhánh tilt LAG **lãi NHẸ HƠN base** (12.9% vs 13.5%, dù DD tốt hơn). Vì LAG đang ở **percentile-3 (đáy chu kỳ)** ngay lúc này, đó là cảnh báo: phần lợi của tilt dồn vào các năm LAG mạnh (2020-21, 2024-25). → Triển khai **vừa phải lúc đầu (LAG 58-60% ở good-state) và đẩy lên 65% khi `lag_edge_health.csv` hồi**, thay vì nhảy thẳng 65% khi edge đang đáy.

Giờ mình ghi lại vào memory + finding doc.

input.content:
# Finding #3 — State-conditional LAG/BAL capital allocator (validated, two-book)
**[REDACTED]11. Follow-up to user Q: "LAG hiệu quả hơn momentum — tăng tỉ trọng LAG theo state?"**

## Premise checks (all confirmed)
- **LAG >> BAL standalone** (each 25B): FULL BAL 19.0%/Sh1.20 vs LAG 29.9%/Sh1.57; 2025+ BAL 2.6% vs LAG 25.0%.
- **LAG alpha is REAL, not ETF-beta**: on PEAD-live days LAG earns +42%/yr (full)/+28% (2025); ETF-park-only days −5.8%/yr. So it didn't ride the VIC index rally.
- **LAG scales well (mild capacity decay)**: 25B FULL 28.1% → 40B 25.7% → 60B 25.3% → 120B 22.6% (deployed 39.5%→33%). Far better than capit (which collapsed). LAG can absorb more capital.

## The decisive nuance — LAG by DT5G state (annualized / Sharpe, full history)
| State | BAL | LAG | |
|---|---|---|---|
| CRISIS(1) | 8.1% / 0.92 | 21.2% / 0.79 | ~tie |
| **BEAR(2)** | **6.0% / 1.59** | **−14.4% / −0.97** | **BAL — LAG LOSES money** |
| NEUTRAL(3) | 22.3% / 1.39 | 31.2% / 1.69 | LAG |
| BULL(4) | 48% / 1.55 | 87% / 4.01 | LAG |
| EXBULL(5) | −12% / −0.39 | 114% / 3.22 | LAG |
Corr BAL/LAG daily = 0.48 (diversifying, not redundant). PEAD fails in BEAR (good earnings sold) → must drop LAG there.

## Faithful one-wallet test (per-name weight tilt; 50B; mom+LAG+capit+park)
- A base (flat LAG .05): FULL 21.85%/−24.1/Sh1.29; 2025+ 13.67%/Sh0.76. (Base's worst DD = the 2025 grind itself.)
- B aggressive (good=.08, BEAR=0): 2025+ +5.7pp but FULL MaxDD −24.1→−26.6 (amplified the **2020 COVID crash** −12.6→−20.0; LAG has no stop, big longs rode it down).
- **F gentle (good=.065, BEAR=0): STRICTLY DOMINATES — FULL 22.94% (+1.1pp), DD −23.5 (better), Sh 1.35; 2025+ 19.65% (+6pp), DD −20.7, Sh 0.99.** Magnitude matters more than which good-state. Aggressive overshoots into crash tail-risk; gentle stays under that threshold.

## Two-book (PRODUCTION architecture) capital allocator — book weights by state, rebalance at state transition, ~6% LAG capacity haircut applied
| Scheme (BEAR [REDACTED] LAG 0) | FULL | DD | Sh | Cal | 2025+ |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| base 50/50 | 24.81% | −20.5 | 1.62 | 1.21 | 13.68% |
| USER (NEU 65, others 50) | 25.28% | −19.1 | 1.70 | 1.32 | 13.45% |
| **LAG 65 ALL good-states** | **26.12%** | **−18.6** | **1.79** | **1.40** | **16.11%** |
| moderate (NEU 60) | 25.39% | −19.2 | 1.73 | 1.32 | 14.17% |

**Recommended scheme** (w_LAG by state): CRISIS 0.50 · **BEAR 0.00** · NEUTRAL 0.65 · BULL 0.65 · EXBULL 0.65.
→ FULL 24.8→26.1% (+1.3pp), MaxDD −20.5→−18.6, Sharpe 1.62→1.79, Calmar 1.21→1.40; 2025+ 13.7→16.1%. Apply 65/35 across ALL good states (not NEUTRAL-only — captures LAG's BULL/EXBULL edge); user's NEUTRAL-only version barely moved 2025+.

## Caveats (deploy moderately)
1. **Edge-cycle**: in LAG's weak patch (2022-2024) the tilt LAGS base on return (12.9 vs 13.5%, better DD only). LAG is at **percentile-3 NOW** ([[edge-health-monitor-amh1-2026]]) → the tilt's gains concentrate in strong-LAG years (2020-21, 2024-25). **Start moderate (LAG 58-60% good-states) and ramp to 65% as `lag_edge_health.csv` recovers (12M-mean > +4-5%).**
2. Two-book numbers carry ~6% LAG capacity haircut (conservative); one-wallet base spec (21.85%) < two-book champion (25.77%) — use the DELTAS, not absolutes, across architectures.
3. This is the [[sleeve-budget-allocator-2026]] concept made concrete for the BAL/LAG split.
4. Tilting hard amplifies fast-crash tail-risk (LAG no-stop); BEAR=0 + gentle sizing is the guardrail.

Scripts: `workspace/pt_onewallet_allocator.py` (one-wallet arms A/B/E/F), two-book allocator inline (book-weight rebalance over `data/pt_v22_{bal,lag}_v21_cap.csv`).

# Kickoff — BAL & LAG Stock-Selection Deep-Dive
**Created [REDACTED]12 for a fresh session. Goal: improve the SELECTION criteria of V2.3's two books (BAL momentum, LAG PEAD) to reduce style-drag — work inside the SIGNAL, not via defensive overlays.**

## Why this session exists
V2.3 = V2.2 (BAL|LAG static + ETF parking) + capit sleeve = production champion (26.2%/Sh1.66/DD−20.1/Cal1.31, 2014→2026-05). Its only real weakness is the **2025-08→ style-divergence grind** (−11.8% / 294d underwater while VNINDEX +8.4%; breadth was 0.55 = NOT narrow — so the lag is from STOCK SELECTION / style rotation, not megacap-avoidance).

**Already ruled OUT this session (do NOT re-try):**
- Book C (value 3rd book) — dropped; value+momentum co-fell in 2025-26, only a Sharpe (not grind/tail) gain.
- Narrow-bull index participation overlay — no-op + premise wrong (breadth wasn't narrow).
- Book-level grind stops (DD-stop / NAV<MA / mom<0) — with real TC all cost 4-7pp CAGR, whipsaw, cut at bottoms.
- Conclusion that pointed here: the only lever left is **the selection logic itself**.

## CURRENT SELECTION — BAL (Book A), file `signal_v11_sql.py` (SIGNAL_V11)
A 100-pt composite TA score `ta` (~22 weighted CASE WHEN terms), then `play_type` by `ta` threshold × DT5G state × `fa_tier`.
- **`ta` components** (momentum-heavy): RSI level (>0.50 +25, >0.75 +5, <0.30 −10) · MA-stack (Close>MA50>MA200 +25, Close>MA20 +15) · volume surge (Vol≥1.3×Vol_3M_P50 & up +20) · MACDdiff>0 +15 · PE-vs-5Y (cheap +15 / rich −15) · VNINDEX rsi_max3m>0.65 +10 · near-3Y-high ID_HI_3Y≤5 +8 · D_RSI_Max1W>0.65 +5 · FSCORE≥8 +10 · NP YoY (+8/−8) · NP QoQ +8 · sector (banks/8,9 +5; 4,7 −5) · MA50 slope (+5/+5/−5) · drawdown-from-3M-high (Close/HI_3M<0.85 −10) · bank fa_tier (D +10 / A −10).
- **play_type tiers** (buys ONLY in state 3/4/5 — never CRISIS/BEAR): MEGA (ta≥170 bull C/D) · S_PRO (ta≥170) · MOMENTUM (ta≥155 bull C/D) · MOMENTUM_QUALITY (ta≥155 A/B) · MOMENTUM_N (ta≥155 NEUTRAL C/D, fresh-Q≤60d) · COMPOUNDER_BUY (A/B, pe_z<−0.5, ta≥95) · DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY (C, ta≥100, bull, NP|Rev YoY>20%) · MOMENTUM_S (ta≥140) · MOMENTUM_A (ta≥125) · MOMENTUM_S_N (NEUTRAL ta≥140) · COMPOUNDER_HOLD/WAIT/PASS.
- **Book trades tiers (TIER_BAL)**: MEGA, MOMENTUM, MOMENTUM_N, MOMENTUM_S, DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY, RE_BACKLOG_BUY. tier 10%/name, max 12, hold 45d, stop −20%, regime_size overlay, overheat-AVOID, +D1 RE_BACKLOG_BUY (bank ICB 8633).
- **Structural reason it lags grinds**: it chases strength (RSI/MA-stack/near-highs/volume) → when leadership rotates, it holds the prior winners and buys into fading momentum. fa_tier used INVERTED (C/D get the strong-momentum tiers; A/B get quality/compounder) — momentum book likes lower-quality names.

## CURRENT SELECTION — LAG (Book B), PEAD schedule (logic in `pt_v22_dt5g.py` §4, panels from earnings pkls)
- Event filter: **NP_R ≥ 15** (earnings YoY surprise ratio) AND **prior_n_good ≥ 4** (≥4 prior good-surprise quarters = track record) AND **pa_HL3 ≥ 5** (3yr-half-life-weighted prior post-earnings drift ≥ 5%).
- Entry T+5 after Release_Date, hold 25 trading days, sizing 10% (LAG_HI if surprise>0.5) / 8% (LAG_LO), **NO stop**, ETF-park {3:0.7} idle cash.
- Pure post-earnings-announcement-drift (PEAD). ⚠️ **LAG edge at 3rd percentile** (latest-12M +0.26%/42% win vs 2024 peak +9.8%/80%) — see [[edge-health-monitor-amh1-2026]]; cyclical but must watch.

## PROGRESS
- ✅ **Angle #1 DONE ([REDACTED]12) — see `workspace/bal_lag_finding1_exbull.md`**: per-term IC attribution found BAL momentum block INVERTS in EX-BULL (state5==5, IC_mom −0.31, 3/3 episodes). This caused the START of the 2025-08 grind (Aug-Sep 2025 = 27d EX-BULL, book bought the top; overheat guard never fired). Momentum-of-momentum gate works pooled but stayed POSITIVE through the grind (didn't flag it). Decomposition: EW quality universe absolutely declined while index rose on megacaps (VIC). The actual grind winners (VIC ta89, energy BSR/GAS/PVD/OIL ta50-82, VVS) scored LOW-MID `ta` → 0/20 top winners buyable at ta≥140. Momentum gradient flat in NEUTRAL (can't lower threshold) but steep in BULL (can't raise). REDIRECT: capturing them needs an orthogonal CYCLICAL/ENERGY or megacap sleeve (not generic value Book C) — future session.

## Research angles for the new session (pick/sequence as you see fit)
1. **Component IC attribution on BAL's `ta`**: which of the ~22 terms actually predict fwd return, in which DT5G state? Decompose `ta` → per-term IC (clean LEAD fwd-ret, NOT profit_*). Likely finding hypothesis: momentum terms strong in trend, destructive in rotation; value/quality terms weak in bull. Re-weight or regime-condition the score.
2. **Style-rotation detector for BAL**: is there a causal signal (leadership breadth, momentum-of-momentum decay, sector dispersion) that flags when to DOWN-weight the momentum tiers vs lean COMPOUNDER/value tiers — WITHOUT a defensive stop (those failed)?
3. **LAG threshold re-fit + decay**: re-examine NP_R≥15 / prior_n_good≥4 / pa_HL3≥5 against latest data; has PEAD drift compressed (hold 25d still optimal)? Is the edge regime-conditional?
4. **fa_tier role revisit**: BAL inverts FA (C/D momentum). Memory says momentum book RESISTS FA overlays ([[fa-layer-ic-audit-2026]], [[fa-rating-8l-pergroup-2026]]) — re-confirm whether any quality gate helps SELECTION (vs sizing).
5. **Capacity-aware**: any selection change must hold at 50B+ NAV (capit capacity trap lesson). Validate on the faithful 2-ledger engine, not reduced harness.

## Data / entry points
- BAL signal: `signal_v11_sql.py` (SIGNAL_V11). LAG: `pt_v22_dt5g.py` §4 + earnings pkls (earnings_px / lagged_pos_ov / earnings_surprise_data / earnings_events_classified).

- ⚠️ Table/column name collision: [REDACTED] alias tables, qualify columns (e.g. `tk.ticker='VNINDEX'`). Forward cols (profit_*) NEVER as live filters; use clean LEAD fwd-ret for IC.

## Method discipline (from this workspace's track record)
- Signal-level edge ≠ integrated edge: validate every change on the FAITHFUL full-NAV book, not a reduced harness (many signal-level wins die at integration).
- Charge real TC; adversarially check; report rejections honestly. Momentum book has repeatedly RESISTED overlays — expect to reject more than you adopt.

cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && head -190 pt_v22_capit_v21.py > workspace/pt_v22_final_combined.py && cat >> workspace/pt_v22_final_combined.py <<'PYEOF'
# ================= FINAL COMBINED: EXBULL fix + state-conditional allocator =================
import numpy as np
print("running combined 2x2 (EXBULL on/off x allocator on/off)...")

# --- BAL signal variants ---
sig_mom_base = sig_mom.copy()
sig_mom_exb  = sig_mom.copy()
EXB_MOM = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY","MOMENTUM_A","S_PRO"}
st_of = sig_mom_exb["time"].map(state_by_date)
nsupp = ((st_of==5) & sig_mom_exb["play_type"].isin(EXB_MOM)).sum()
sig_mom_exb.loc[(st_of==5) & sig_mom_exb["play_type"].isin(EXB_MOM), "play_type"] = "AVOID_exbull"
print(f"  EXBULL: suppressed {nsupp} momentum signals in state5==5")

def bal_capit(sigmom, tag):
    b0 = runb(sigmom, TIER_BAL, "BAL_"+tag, TIER_WEIGHTS)
    sb, tb, eb = addcap_v21(sigmom, b0, TIER_WEIGHTS, tag)
    bc = runb(sb, TIER_BAL+[t for t in tb if t.startswith("CAP")], "BALc_"+tag, tb, eb)
    return bc

balC_base = bal_capit(sig_mom_base, "BASE")
balC_exb  = bal_capit(sig_mom_exb,  "EXB")
lagB = runl(sig_lag, LAG_TW, "LAG_v21")
sl, tl, el = addcap_v21(sig_lag, lagB, LAG_TW, "L")
lagC = runl(sl, tl, "LAG_v21_cap", el)

# series + state
def ser(nav): 
    s=nav.set_index("time"); return s["nav"], s["state"].astype("Int64")
nav_bal_base, st_bal = ser(balC_base)
nav_bal_exb,  _      = ser(balC_exb)
nav_lag,      _      = ser(lagC)
rb_base = nav_bal_base.pct_change()
rb_exb  = nav_bal_exb.pct_change()
rl      = nav_lag.pct_change()
# align
idx = rb_base.index.intersection(rl.index)
df = pd.DataFrame({"rb_base":rb_base, "rb_exb":rb_exb, "rl":rl, "st":st_bal}).loc[idx].dropna()
df["st"]=df["st"].astype(int)

TC=0.001
def alloc(rb, rl, wmap, lag_haircut):
    nav=1.0; w=wmap.get(int(df["st"].iloc[0]),0.5); ps=int(df["st"].iloc[0]); out=[]
    rl_a = rl*(1-lag_haircut)
    for t,row in df.iterrows():
        st=int(row["st"])
        if st!=ps:
            nw=wmap.get(st,0.5); nav*=(1-TC*abs(nw-w)); w=nw; ps=st
        nav*=(1 + w*rl_a.loc[t] + (1-w)*rb.loc[t]); out.append((t,nav))
    return pd.Series(dict(out))
def met(s):
    s=s.dropna(); r=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1; dd=(s/s.cummax()-1).min(); sh=r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252)
    return cagr*100,dd*100,sh,cagr/abs(dd)

FLAT   = {1:.5,2:.5,3:.5,4:.5,5:.5}
ALLOC  = {1:.5,2:.0,3:.65,4:.65,5:.65}   # recommended: BEAR=0, good-states LAG65
HAIR   = 0.06  # LAG capacity haircut for the tilted (heavy-LAG) arms

ARMS = [
  ("(0) BASE 50/50, no EXBULL",      "rb_base", FLAT,  0.0),
  ("(1) +EXBULL only, 50/50",        "rb_exb",  FLAT,  0.0),
  ("(2) +allocator only",            "rb_base", ALLOC, HAIR),
  ("(3) +EXBULL +allocator (FINAL)", "rb_exb",  ALLOC, HAIR),
]
print("\n"+"="*94)
print("FINAL COMBINED — two-book, EXBULL fix + state-conditional LAG allocator (BEAR=0, good LAG65)")
print("="*94)
print(f"{'arm':<34}{'window':>7}{'CAGR':>9}{'MaxDD':>9}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}")
saved={}
for name, rbcol, wmap, hair in ARMS:
    s = alloc(df[rbcol], df["rl"], wmap, hair); saved[name]=s
    for wl,wst in [("FULL","2014-01-01"),("2022+","2022-01-01"),("2025+","2025-01-01")]:
        m=met(s[s.index>=wst])
        print(f"{name:<34}{wl:>7}{m[0]:>8.2f}%{m[1]:>8.1f}%{m[2]:>8.2f}{m[3]:>8.2f}")
    print()
PYEOF
echo "written"; wc -l workspace/pt_v22_final_combined.py

---
name: bal-exbull-momentum-suppression-2026
description: BAL momentum IC inverts in EX-BULL (state5==5); suppressing momentum buys there = validated V2.3 win
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: e388f0eb-36db-4ac3-be7d-416a3f69f5f0
---

BAL/LAG deep-dive Finding #1 ([REDACTED]12), kickoff angle #1 = per-term IC attribution on `ta`.

**Diagnosis**: composite `ta` IC by DT5G state (clean LEAD fwd20, ticker_prune, liq≥1e9, 2014+): momentum block works in BULL(+0.030)/NEUTRAL(+0.059) but **INVERTS hard in EX-BULL state5==5: IC_mom −0.307**, value block stays +0.076. Structural across **3/3** EX-BULL episodes (2020 −0.11 / 2021 −0.48 / 2025 −0.14 — the only state-5 windows in DT5G history). Tier buckets in EX-BULL are monotone-inverted: ta 140-155 → fwd20 −6%/win24%; ta<70 → +5.1%/54%.

**Root cause of the 2025-08 grind START**: book's MEGA/MOMENTUM/MOMENTUM_S/S_PRO tiers fire in `state5 IN (4,5)`. Aug-Sep 2025 = 27 days EX-BULL → book bought peak momentum into euphoria top, then reversed = start of −11.8%/294d grind. Existing `overheat` guard needs VNINDEX>1.30×MA200 which NEVER fired then (index only 1.15-1.28×MA200).

**Fix** (validated faithful 2-ledger engine, real TC, 50B; `workspace/pt_v22_exbull_test.py`): in state5==5 route momentum tiers {MEGA,MOMENTUM,MOMENTUM_S,MOMENTUM_QUALITY,MOMENTUM_A,S_PRO}→AVOID_exbull; keep value tiers (DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY/COMPOUNDER_BUY/RE_BACKLOG_BUY, +IC in EX-BULL). Removes-only → capacity-safe + causal. Result V2.2+capit: FULL 25.77→**26.09%** (DD −20.1→−20.3), **2025+ 18.30→19.85%, DD −18.7→−17.4, Sh 1.04→1.13**. BAL-leg alone: FULL MaxDD **−25.4→−20.6pp**, 2025+ CAGR 2.59→8.36%. Caveat: no-capit base FULL dips slightly (2021 price gains forgone) but production=+capit nets positive.

**NOT yet deployed live** (needs user OK). Deploy = mirror overheat guard in `pt_v22_dt5g.py` after ~line 220. Dormant today (DT5G live = NEUTRAL).

**Finding #2 (angle #2, same session) — NEUTRAL grind persistence is NOT momentum-selection-fixable** (`workspace/bal_lag_finding2_neutral_grind.md`): momentum-of-momentum gate works pooled (NEUTRAL trail120<0 → IC 0.07→−0.01) but stayed POSITIVE through 2025-08+ grind → didn't flag it. The grind = EW quality universe absolutely declined while index rose on megacaps (VIC). Decisive test: VIC +16.2% fwd20 but avg `ta`=89 (ta≥140 only 1% of days); 0 of top-20 grind winners (VIC/energy BSR/GAS/PVD/OIL/VVS, all ta 50-130) were buyable at ta≥140. Momentum gradient FLAT in NEUTRAL (ta125≈155, can't lower without diluting to noise) but STEEP in BULL (can't raise). ⇒ momentum book structurally can't hold megacap/cyclical leaders. Redirect = orthogonal CYCLICAL/ENERGY or megacap-participation sleeve (NOT generic value Book C which co-fell), future session. ---
name: lag-bal-state-conditional-allocator-2026
description: "Tilt capital to LAG over BAL momentum by DT5G state (BEAR=0); validated two-book win, deploy moderately"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: e388f0eb-36db-4ac3-be7d-416a3f69f5f0
---

BAL/LAG deep-dive Finding #3 ([REDACTED]11). User Q: LAG outperforms momentum — increase LAG weight by state?

**Premise confirmed**: LAG >> BAL standalone (each 25B: FULL 29.9%/Sh1.57 vs 19.0%/Sh1.20; 2025+ 25.0% vs 2.6%). LAG alpha REAL not ETF-beta (PEAD-live days +42%/yr, ETF-park-only days −5.8%). LAG scales with mild decay (25B→120B: 28.1%→22.6% CAGR), unlike capit.

**Decisive nuance — LAG by DT5G state (ann/Sharpe, full hist)**: CRISIS 21%/0.79 (~tie BAL) · **BEAR −14%/−0.97 (LAG LOSES — drop it; PEAD fails in bear, good earnings get sold)** · NEUTRAL 31%/1.69 · BULL 87%/4.01 · EXBULL 114%/3.22. Corr BAL/LAG=0.48 (diversifying). 

**Magnitude > targeting; gentle beats aggressive** (faithful one-wallet, per-name weight): base flat .05 → FULL 21.85%/DD−24.1 (worst DD = the 2025 grind). Aggressive (.08) lifts 2025+ but amplifies the 2020 COVID crash (DD −12.6→−20.0; LAG no-stop, big longs ride fast crash). Gentle (.065, BEAR=0) STRICTLY DOMINATES: FULL 22.94%/DD−23.5/Sh1.35, 2025+ 19.65% (+6pp)/Sh0.99.

**Two-book PRODUCTION allocator (book weights by state, rebalance at state transition, ~6% LAG capacity haircut applied)**. Recommended w_LAG: CRISIS 0.50 / **BEAR 0.00** / NEUTRAL 0.65 / BULL 0.65 / EXBULL 0.65 (apply 65/35 to ALL good-states, NOT NEUTRAL-only — user's NEUTRAL-only version barely moved 2025+). Result vs base 50/50: FULL **24.8→26.1%** (+1.3pp), MaxDD **−20.5→−18.6**, Sharpe **1.62→1.79**, Calmar 1.21→1.40; 2025+ **13.7→16.1%**.

**⚠️ Deploy MODERATELY (edge-cycle)**: in LAG's weak patch 2022-2024 the tilt LAGS base on return (12.9 vs 13.5%, better DD only) — gains concentrate in strong-LAG years. LAG is at **percentile-3 NOW** ([[edge-health-monitor-amh1-2026]]). → start LAG 58-60% good-states, ramp to 65% as `lag_edge_health.csv` 12M-mean recovers >+4-5%. Keep BEAR=0 [REDACTED]. See [[bal-exbull-momentum-suppression-2026]], [[v4-faithful-reproduction-2026]].
